name: comScore, Inc.
description: Comscore is a global, trusted partner for planning, transacting, and evaluating media across platforms. With an unmatched data footprint that combines digital, linear TV, over-the-top, and theatrical viewership intelligence with advanced audience insights, Comscore empowers media buyers and sellers to quantify multiscreen behavior and make meaningful business decisions. As a pioneering audience measurement company, Comscore provides the industry with reliable and comprehensive cross-platform measurement, helping businesses navigate media disruption and drive growth through data-driven strategies. The company is headquartered in Reston, Virginia, and serves clients worldwide.
